info.title: https
info.description: Simple CLI for sending HTTP requests

options.name: --form
options.description: Renders the content arguments as application/x-www-form-urlencoded

options.name: --json
options.description: Renders the content arguments as application/json.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Sets the timeout of the request using System.TimeSpan.TryParse (https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.timespan.parse)

options.name: --xml
options.description:
Renders the content arguments as application/xml using the optional xml root name.
--stop-auto-redirects Prevents redirects from automatically being processed.
Content:
Repeat as many content arguments to create content sent with the HTTP request. Alternatively pipe raw content send as the HTTP request content.
<KEY>=<VALUE>
Headers:
Repeat as many header arguments to assign headers for the HTTP request.
<KEY>:<VALUE>

arguments.name: METHOD
arguments.description: HTTP method, i.e., get, head, post

arguments.name: URI
arguments.description: URI to send the request to. Leaving the protocol off the URI defaults to https://
